summary: Verified rebrand from SPEEDHOME to Temu Properti across backend and frontend. Backend /api/ service name updated, all auth and key pages tested with admin login — no 401 regression. All UI pages (Login, Register, Dashboard, Search, Saved, Compare, ROI, Exports, Settings) show 'TEMU PROPERTI' sidebar/header. New export filename uses 'TemuProperti_' prefix (verified via curl Content-Disposition and live UI history). Old 'SPEEDHOME_*' filenames in Export History are pre-rename historical DB records — not a brand regression.
passed: Login page UI shows 'TEMU PROPERTI'; no 'SPEEDHOME' in HTML
Register page UI shows 'TEMU PROPERTI'; no 'SPEEDHOME' in HTML
Sidebar on Dashboard / Search / Saved / Compare / ROI / Exports / Settings all render 'TEMU PROPERTI'
No 401/Unauthorized errors on any authenticated page after login
Newest export history row shows 'TemuProperti_Mont_Kiara_20260626.xlsx' (new prefix in effect)
notes: Export History page also lists older SPEEDHOME_*.xlsx/.csv records — these are pre-existing DB rows from before the rename, not produced by current code. Acceptable.
User email admin@speedhome.com remains unchanged by design (per request).
